MOVE_ELECTRO_SHOT.name: Electro Shot
MOVE_ELECTRO_SHOT.description: Gathers electricity, then fires a high-voltage shot.

MOVE_TERA_STARSTORM.name: Tera Starstorm
MOVE_TERA_STARSTORM.description: In Terapagos's Stellar Form, it hits all foes.

MOVE_FICKLE_BEAM.name: Fickle Beam
MOVE_FICKLE_BEAM.description: Shoots a beam of light. Sometimes twice as strong.

MOVE_BURNING_BULWARK.name: Burning Bulwark
MOVE_BURNING_BULWARK.description: Evades attack, and burns the foe if struck.

MOVE_TACHYON_CUTTER.name: Tachyon Cutter
MOVE_TACHYON_CUTTER.description: Launches particle blades at the target. Strikes twice.

MOVE_DRAGON_CHEER.name: Dragon Cheer
MOVE_DRAGON_CHEER.description: Increases allies' critical hit ratio, especially if Dragons.

MOVE_ALLURING_VOICE.name: Alluring Voice
MOVE_ALLURING_VOICE.description: Confuses foe if its stats were boosted this turn.

MOVE_TEMPER_FLARE.name: Temper Flare
MOVE_TEMPER_FLARE.description: A desperation attack. Power doubles if last move failed.

MOVE_SUPERCELL_SLAM.name: Supercell Slam
MOVE_SUPERCELL_SLAM.description: An electrified slam. If it misses, the user is hurt.

MOVE_PSYCHIC_NOISE.name: Psychic Noise
MOVE_PSYCHIC_NOISE.description: Unpleasant sound waves that damage and prevent healing.

MOVE_UPPER_HAND.name: Upper Hand
MOVE_UPPER_HAND.description: Makes the target flinch if readying a priority move.

MOVE_MALIGNANT_CHAIN.name: Malignant Chain
MOVE_MALIGNANT_CHAIN.description: A corrosive chain attack that may badly poison.
